justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent needed one clarification to understand "tonight, around 9 am" as "next Monday, June 8th, around 9 AM."
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent successfully proposed a close alternative time when the user's initial request was unavailable.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent had one unnecessary clarification turn regarding the date, but otherwise the conversation was efficient.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was mostly fine, with one minor friction point regarding the date clarification.
